body:
Hey Amara, following up on our conversation from last week — I wanted to circle back on the [Helio Energy](companies/helio-energy) deal now that their updated deck is out. I've had a chance to dig into the revised unit economics and I think the storage-to-grid efficiency numbers are more defensible than the first version, which was the main sticking point for me. Given your focus on climate infrastructure at [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital), I figured this might be worth a closer look from your side before the round gets too crowded. They're targeting a close by end of Q2, so there's still a reasonable window, but a few other firms have been sniffing around. Would love to sync this week if you have 30 minutes — happy to share my notes from the founder call as a starting point.

— Ravi
